Who We Are

Your Louisville Electrical Experts

Ram Electric started with a simple goal: provide honest, reliable electrical services to our Louisville neighbors. We're not just electricians; we're your neighbors, committed to keeping our community powered safely and efficiently.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our team is built on experience, training, and a dedication to exceeding expectations. Clear communication, upfront pricing, and meticulous workmanship are at the heart of our approach.

We're proud to be a part of the Louisville community. From supporting local events to providing reliable electrical services for our friends and neighbors, we're invested in the success of our city.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Ram Electric

Experienced Technicians

Our team has decades of combined experience handling any electrical challenge.

Upfront Pricing

No surprises. We provide clear, detailed quotes before any work begins.

24/7 Emergency Service

Electrical emergencies don't wait. We're available around the clock.

Licensed & Insured

Protecting you and your property is our top priority. We are fully licensed and insured.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Ram Electric did an amazing job upgrading our electrical panel. We live in an older home in the Highlands, and they were very careful and professional. The new panel has made a huge difference, and we no longer have to worry about tripped breakers. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Electrical Panel Upgrade
“

We hired Ram Electric to install recessed lighting in our kitchen, and we're very happy with the results. The electricians were punctual, courteous, and did a great job. There was a small delay in getting the fixtures but the communication was great.

David K. Lighting Installation
“

Ram Electric is our go-to for all our commercial electrical needs. They are responsive, reliable, and always do a great job. We own a restaurant in NuLu, and they've helped us with everything from fixing faulty wiring to installing new equipment.

Jessica L. Commercial Electrical Repairs
“

I had an electrical emergency late one night, and Ram Electric was there within an hour. The electrician was professional and quickly diagnosed the problem. He was able to fix it on the spot, and I was so relieved. I highly recommend them for any electrical emergency.

Michael B. Emergency Electrical Service
“

With all the storms we get in Louisville, I wanted to make sure my electronics were protected. Ram Electric installed a whole-house surge protector, and I feel much better knowing my appliances are safe. The installation was quick and easy, and the price was reasonable.

Jennifer P. Surge Protection Installation
“

Ram Electric rewired my entire home and did an excellent job. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. They explained everything clearly and answered all my questions. My house is safer and more energy-efficient now.

Robert S. Residential Electrical Services

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my home's electrical system inspected?
We recommend a comprehensive electrical inspection every 3-5 years, especially for older homes. Regular inspections can identify potential hazards and prevent costly repairs.
What are the signs that my electrical panel needs to be upgraded?
Common signs include flickering lights, frequently tripped breakers, and a burning smell coming from the panel. An outdated panel can be a fire hazard and should be replaced promptly.
Do you offer emergency electrical services?
Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency electrical services for Louisville residents. Call us anytime for immediate assistance with urgent electrical issues.
